series_title: News Clips / Bureau Clips / News Clip emails
series_description: Copies of news articles from current newspapers / news services and emails of articles found on media webpages. These articles containing information regarding the Ohio Facilities Construction Commission and/or the Ohio School Facilities Commission; school district projects funded by the School Facilities Commission, and other subjects of interest and value to the staff of the Facilities Construction Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value.

series_description: All informal and/or temporary messages and notes including telephone voice mail messages, instant messages, text messages, post-it-notes, general/generic emails, correspondence, junk mail and emails, shared departmental calendars, drafts, and other time-limited documents which serve to convey information of temporary importance in lieu of oral communication. All records will be reviewed to ensure that any confidential information is redacted prior to recycling.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Includes entity checks, remittances, batch summaries, and Treasurer revenue receipts.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain on-site until audited

series_description: All invoices submitted for payment
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years onsite plus two (2) years offsite after close of fiscal year in which created ; Electronic: Retain four years after close of fiscal year in which created

series_description: Includes all vouchers submitted for payment
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years onsite plus two (2) years offsite after audit and fiscal close of fiscal year in which created. An exception is created for for construction manager payments, which are retained onsite during the active period of the project ; Electronic: Retain four (4) years, except for construction manager payments, which are retained during the active period fo the project

series_title: Requests for Stop. Release, or Cancellation of Warrant
series_description: All requests submitted, including supporting documentation for the request, to stop, release, or cancel payment of a warrant.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until Auditor of State audit released and all discrepancies resolved. ; Electronic: Retain until Auditor of State audit released and all discrepancies resolved.

series_description: Forms used to change address information or other required information on a warrant, plus any other related documents or correspondence.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer needed ; Electronic: Retain until no longer needed.

series_title: Application, Affidavit, and Related Documents for Replacement Warrants
series_description: All documents related to a request for a replacement warrant including the application, submitted affidavits, correspondence, and other documentation of the request.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until Auditor of State audit released and all discrepancies resolved. ; Electronic: Retain until Auditor of State audit released and all discrepancies resolved.

series_description: Includes, but is not limited to: documents pertaining to agency budget narratives, expenditure justifications, executive budget proposals, spending authority adjustments, and all other materials relating to the development of the agency''s requested budget, actual budget, and specific budget issues.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four (4) years after close of fiscal year in which created. ; Electronic: Retain four (4) years after close of fiscal year in which created.

series_description: Materials and forms used to obtain authorization and payment for out-of-state travel
retention_statement: Paper: Four (4) years afdter close of fiscal year in which created ; Electronic: Four (4) years afdter close of fiscal year in which created

series_description: All financial balance sheets
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years following audit. ; Electronic: Retain two (2) years following audit.

series_description: All documents regarding requests allowing agency to establish or increase appropriation authority in special funds. These would include, but are not limited to, Controlling Board submission forms, testimony, written responses to questions from board members, and similar documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until state audits has been conducted, reports release, and all discrepancies resolved. ; Electronic: Retain until state audits has been conducted, reports release, and all discrepancies resolved.

series_description: All legal notices and advertisement, correspondence, and other related documents regarding competitive bidding for a project.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for three years following project financial close. ; Electronic: Keep for three years after project financial close.

series_description: Bank Deposit slips, ledgers, bank statements, cancelled checks, and related documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until state audit released and all discrepancies resolved. ; Electronic: Retain until state audit released and all discrepancies resolved.

series_description: Bi-weekly document recording hours worked, leave time used, and overtime/compensatory hours worked.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited, audit report is released, and all discrepancies resolved. ; Electronic: Retain until audited, audit report is released, and all discrepancies resolved.

series_description: Contact information for employees in the event of any emergency
retention_statement: Paper: Retained until superseded or until the employee separates from the designated position. ; Electronic: Retained until superseded or until the employee separates from the designated position.

series_description: Statements disclosing financial information for employees serving in designated positions. (The forms are filed with the Ohio Ethics Commission, By policy, the Ohio Facilities Construction Commission maintains a copy of the front page -- information sheet.)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until converted to machine readable, are superseded, or until the employee separates from the designated position. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded or until the employee separates from the designated position.

series_description: Statement of grievance, written responses, and all related documents, including arbitrator response if applicable.
retention_statement: Paper: Seven (7) years after case is closed ; Electronic: Seven (7) years after case is closed

series_description: Documents that each new employee (citizen or non-citizen) hired after November 6, 1986 is authorized to work in the United States. (Federal Immigration and Reform Control Act)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until converted to machine readable, or for either three (3) years or for one year after separation ; Electronic: Retain for either three (3) years or for one year after separation

series_description: Documents, agreements, and notes on negotiated union contract language specifically affecting the agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until contract is susperseded or obsolete. ; Electronic: Retain until contract is susperseded or obsolete.

series_description: Applicant materials, such as civil service applications, letters of interest, resumes, reference materials, and other documents pertaining to an applicant, their work experience, or education
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years after position is filled, or until converted to machine readable. ; Electronic: Retain two (2) years after positions is filled.

series_description: Staffings charts for each department
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current, plus one (1) year of history. ; Electronic: Retain current, plus one (1) year of history.

series_description: Files relating to individual''s employment at the agency. May include, but is not limited to, civil service applications, personnel actions, performance evaluations, new hire information firms, education documents, disciplinary actions (unless previously expunged), training certificates/licenses/degrees, professional reference letters, address change forms, transcripts, resumes, positions descriptions, tuition reimbursement forms, correspondence, background check forms, exit interview questionnaires, medical information, benefit information, resignation documents, and unemployment documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years following employee''s separation ; Electronic: Retain for 50 years following separation.

series_description: Documentation that substantiates or is related to the cause, nature, and/or extent of the disabling illness, injury, or condition for which an employee is requesting disability leave benefits.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one (1) year after separation. ; Electronic: Retain for one (1) year after separation.

series_description: Health, dental and vision insurance enrollments documentation and verification documents for both employee and eligible dependents (including but not limited to birth, adoption, and marriage certificates; divorce decrees, school enrollment forms, or loss of coverage documentation).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, converted to machine readable or retain for one (1) year after separation. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded or for one (1) year after separation.

series_title: Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA) Documents
series_description: All medical certification and related documents regarding employee''s and/or family member''s serious medical condition.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until converted to machine-readable or for one (1) year after separation ; Electronic: Retain for one (1) year after separation.

series_description: Documentation of employee suspensions and terminations
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) from date or discipline. In the event of multiple disciplines within that period ; Electronic: Retain two (2) from date or discipline. In the event of multiple disciplines within that period

series_description: Documentation of verbal and/or written reprimands.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) from date of discipline. In the event of multiple disciplines within that period ; Electronic: Retain two (2) from date of discipline. In the event of multiple disciplines within that period

series_description: Documents pertaining to any internal investigations of agency employees. Includes but is not limited to violations of Commission work rules, policies, Ohio Administrative Code or the Ohio Revised Code.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two years following separation ; Electronic: Retain for 50 years following employee''s separation.

series_description: All information collected on potential employees. Includes but is not limited to drug tests, credit reports, and criminal background checks.
retention_statement: Electronic: Non-hired candidates - retain for five years. Hired candidates - retain for 50 years following employee''s separation. ; Paper: Non-hired candidates - retain for five years. Hired candidates, retain for two years following separation

series_description: All assessments of buildings within a school district done by the agency or its consultants, including but not limited to, any follow-up or environmental assessments and any related documentation, and used as part of the development of a Master Facilities Plan for the district
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to machine Readable or until project close-out ; Electronic: Until project close-out

series_description: Documents related to the selection of subcontractors for Construction Manager at Risk and Design-Build construction management projects. Includes, but is not limited to, prequalification criteria and lists of prequalified companies along with Edge certifications, OSHA and Drug Free Workplace registration certifications,, bid tabs, notices of awards, correspondence, and other related documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 15 years after project financial close. ; Electronic: 15 years after project financial close.

series_description: Submitted bids with bonds and other related documents. Includes, but is not limited to, EDGE certifications, OSHA training and Drug Free Workplace registration certifications. Also, bid tabs, notices of award, subcontractor and materials lists, and all correspondence.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 15 years after project financial close. ; Electronic: 15 years after project financial close.

series_description: All compliance reviews with comments and responses, constructability reviews, variance applications and supporting documentation, and estimates. Also includes, but is not limited to, documents related to Value Engineering decisions, LEED documents, and phase review materials (including acceptance forms).
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format ; Electronic: Kept for three years after project financial close.

series_description: All documents related to the design of a new builidng or the renovation of all or part of a current facility. Includes, but is not limited to the Program of Requirements (POR), the schematic design drawings and specifications, the design development drawings and specifications, and the construction drawings and specifications.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for three years after project financial close. Review by State prior to disposal. ; Electronic: Until three years after project financial close. Review by State Archives prior to disposal.

series_description: Documents recording the ratings given to submissions for the purposes of determining best qualified firms. Includes, but is not limited individual and summary rater forms, individual and summary ranking forms, scores from "Best Value" ratings, and other supporting documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or until project financial close. ; Electronic: Until project financial close.

series_description: Documents included in the submitted response to a Request for Qualifications or Request for Proposals. Includes, but is not limited to, Statements of Qualifications and/or Proposals, Guaranteed Maximum Price proposals, clarifications and revised submissions, and other documents related to the materials submitted.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or until project fiscal close. ; Electronic: Until project fiscal close.

series_description: Documents associated with the selection of project architects, construction managers, consultants, and other specialty contracts. Includes, but is not limited to legal notices, Requests for Qualifications and Requests for Proposals, amendments, Question & Answer documents, and other correspondence related to the selection, selection process, and public notification of opportunity.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or until project fiscal close. ; Electronic: Keep until project fiscal close.

series_title: Documents related to goods or services
series_description: Direct Purchase Order and/or requisitions, and any supporting documentation related to the purchase of goods and/or services.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four (4) years after close of fiscal year in which created ; Electronic: Retain four (4) years after close of fiscal year in which created

series_description: All Notices of Conditional Approval (NOCA), Certifications or Conditional Approval, Resolutions to Participate, Resolutions of Acceptance, Project Agreements, and all related documents and correspondence.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 3 years after project close-out ; Electronic: 3 years after project close-out

series_description: All Master Facilities Plans developed for a district detailing the scope of work and projected budget, all amendments to the original Master Facilities Plan and all related documents and correspondence
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format or for 5 years after project close-out ; Electronic: 5 years after project close-out

series_description: All projections for future student enrollment within a school district done by the agency or its consultants, including but not limited to updated projections and related documents, and used as part of the development of a Master Facilities Plan for the district.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format or until project close-out. ; Electronic: Until project close-out.

series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, signed contracts, agreements, and amendments for design, construction, commissioning, specialty consulting, or other professional services required by the agency. Also includes, but is not limited to, payment and performance bonds, change orders (with supporting documentation), Drug Free Worplace certifications, EDGE certifications, and other related documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 15 years after project financial close. ; Electronic: 15 years after project financial close.

series_description: Signed contracts, agreements, and amendments for design, construction, commissioning, and other professional services required for the completion of agency projects. Includes, but is not limited to, payment and performance bonds, Drug Free Workplace certifications, EDGE certifications, and other related documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 15 years after project financial close. ; Electronic: 15 years after project financial close.

series_description: All paper or electronic communications related to the project not covered by any other retention schedule.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 15 years after project financial close. ; Electronic: 15 years after project financial close.

series_description: All daily, weekly, monthly, and special reports
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 15 years after project financial close. ; Electronic: 15 years after project financial close.

series_description: All minutes of the Core, Executive Partnering, or other formal meetings associated with the project.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 15 years after project financial close. Subject to review by State subject to . ; Electronic: 15 years after project financial close. Subject to review by State Archives subject to destruction.
disposition: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase Destruction Archives

series_description: All baseline schedules for project activities and any updated schedules development for the project.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 3 years after project financial close. ; Electronic: 3 years after project close-out.

series_description: All project budgets and admendments with supporting documentation and related documents, all drawdown schedules, and documentation of Locally Funded Initiatives (including any Memorandums of Understanding).
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 3 years after project financial close. ; Electronic: 3 years after project financial close.

series_title: Contractor, Construction Manager, and Architect Evaluations
series_description: All paper or electronic evaluations of work and performance done by a trade contractor construction manager, architect, or other professional firm engage on an agency project.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 3 years after project financial close. ; Electronic: 3 years after project financial close.

series_description: All building Occupancy Certificates, As-Built documents (record documents, drawings, and specifications), operations and maintenance manuals, warranties, and supporting documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 15 years after project financial close. Copies provided to project owner and to State for historical review. ; Electronic: 15 years after project financial close. Copies provided to project owner and to State Archives for historical review.

series_description: All material related to claims or disputes filed on a project, including but not limited to correspondence, expert reports, mediation proposals and documentation, and supporting materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 15 years after project financial close. ; Electronic: 15 years after project financial close.

series_description: Annual reports that are required by the Ohio Revised Code, plus any other reports published or requested regarding agency activities
retention_statement: Paper: Convert to electronic format. Archive copy to be forwarded to State . Fulfill requirements of O.R.C. 149.11. Destroy excess copies when no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Fulfill requirements of O.R.C. 149.11

series_description: Publications produced by an agency detailing operations, regulations, and/or prcedures of an agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Transfer to State for review prior to . Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced., or converted to electronic format. ; Electronic: Transfer to State Archives for review prior to destruction. Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced., or converted to electronic format.
disposition: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase Destruction Archives

series_description: Record documenting entry and departure of visitors to the Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one (1) year

series_description: Official minutes, resolutions, attachments, and supporting documentation approved by either the Ohio Facilities Construction Commission or the Ohio School Facilities Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until converted to electronic format, or for two (2) years ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years

series_description: Records which document any active, pending, or potential legal cases to which OFCC is a party or which arise as a result of an OFCC project, including court records, research materials, reports, memoranda, correspondence, attorney notes, and any other attorney work product, records, or information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed ; Electronic: Retain 2 years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed

series_description: Correspondence from the chair, Vice-chair, member of the Commission, or the Executive Director dealing with the administration of the office. Includes both paper and electronic (email) materials. Subject matter includes agency policies, procedures, program, fiscal, and personnel matters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two years ; Electronic: Retain two years

series_description: Includes all internal correspondence (letters, memos) not directly related to an agency project or not addressed by other sections of the agency''s records retention schedules and is informative by nature and does not attempt to influence agency policy. Also includes correspondence or inquiries from other agencies, individuals, companies, or organizations requesting information pertaining to the OFCC, and any other miscellaneous inquiry.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain six months, or until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain six months, or until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Accident / Illness Reports - Bureau of Workers Compensation Claims
series_description: Accident or illness report forms with detailed incident information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until converted to machine-readable or retain for one (1) year after separation. ; Electronic: Retain for one (1) year after separation.

series_description: All materials involving requests for agency records, including but not limited to, documentation of requests for copies of opportunities to review agency records, copies of materials provided, and all logs documenting action on requests received by the agency
retention_statement: Paper: Three years from date of request fulfillment ; Electronic: Three years from date of request fulfillment

series_description: All legal agreements, memorandums of understanding, capital expenditure submittals, and other documents related to the expenditure of allocated funding by a grantee.
retention_statement: Paper: In order to accommodate any requested audits by the U.S. Department of the Treasury, all materials are to be kept 3 (three) years from term of bond or until converted to electronic medium. ; Electronic: In order to accommodate any requested audits by the U.S. Department of the Treasury, all materials are to be kept 3 (three) years from term of bond

series_description: All documentation related to the application of a school district to participate in an energy conservation (HB 264) program project. The documentation includes, but is not limited to, the materials submitted by the district and any analysis or report done by Commission staff to verify the information submitted in the application.
retention_statement: Paper: Following redaction of any priviledged information, seven (7) years from approval of application or until converted to electronic format. ; Electronic: Following redaction of any priviledged information,seven (7) years from approval of application

series_description: Tape, CD, or DVD backups of server data files used for archival or emergency restoration purposes. (Backup intervals vary greatly and some material is stored away from Commission offices.)
retention_statement: Electronic: One (1) year after new backup is made.
